title: AI for American-Produced Cement and Concrete
summary:
Meta is continuing its long-term roadmap to help the construction industry leverage AI to produce high-quality and more sustainable concrete mixes, as well as those exclusively produced in the United States.  Concurrent with the 2026 American Concrete Institute (ACI) Spring Convention, Meta is releasing a new AI model for designing concrete mixes – Bayesian Optimization [...]

Read More...

The post AI for American-Produced Cement and Concrete appeared first on Engineering at Meta.

processed.summary:
Meta leverages **Bayesian Optimization** to accelerate the discovery and design of high-performance, sustainable concrete mixtures.
 The model focuses on optimizing material proportions to meet strict **carbon footprint** and quality requirements for American-produced cement.
 This approach transitions AI from digital domains into **physical infrastructure**, streamlining industrial engineering workflows for the construction sector.
key_results: Release of a specialized Bayesian Optimization model for material science applications.
Optimization of concrete mixtures for both sustainability and high-quality mechanical properties.
Alignment of AI design outputs with US-based production requirements and local supply chains.
Integration of AI-driven material discovery into American Concrete Institute (ACI) standards.
Establishment of a long-term AI roadmap for reducing the carbon intensity of infrastructure.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: Meta releases a Bayesian Optimization model to accelerate the design of sustainable, US-produced concrete for industrial infrastructure.

title: The rise and fall of IBM's 4 Pi aerospace computers: an illustrated history

processed.summary:
- The **IBM 4 Pi** was a series of radiation-hardened computers that successfully adapted the **System/360 mainframe architecture** for high-reliability aerospace and military environments.
- The hardware utilized **monolithic integrated circuits** and core memory to survive extreme conditions, powering critical systems for the **Space Shuttle**, Skylab, and the B-52 bomber.
- A primary architectural innovation was the use of a **standardized instruction set**, allowing developers to write and test code on mainframes before deploying to flight hardware.
key_results: Detailed documentation of the AP-101 flight computer architecture and its evolution.
Analysis of the transition from magnetic core memory to semiconductor storage in space.
Impact of radiation hardening on CPU design and instruction set complexity.
Case study on the longevity of the 4 Pi series across multiple decades of NASA missions.
Comparison of military-spec ruggedized hardware versus commercial mainframe equivalents.
processed.one_sentence_takeaway: Ken Shirriff details how IBM's 4 Pi series brought standardized mainframe computing architecture to critical aerospace missions.

title: Canadian man says U.S. border officers made him give DNA sample

processed.summary:
- Reports on **U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP)** enforcing mandatory biometric data acquisition protocols for non-U.S. citizens detained at border crossings.
- Details the workflow where **DNA samples** are collected via cheek swabs and submitted to the FBI’s **CODIS database** for permanent storage and profiling.
- Highlights the expanding scope of the **DNA Fingerprint Act of 2005**, which has moved from criminal suspects to general detainee populations.
- Discusses the **legal and privacy impact** of centralized genetic data collection on international relations and individual civil liberties.
key_results: U.S. CBP mandated DNA collection from a Canadian citizen despite no criminal charges.
Data collection is authorized under the expanded DNA Fingerprint Act of 2005.
Samples are processed by the FBI and integrated into the national CODIS database.

title: Show HN: Twitch Roulette – Find live streamers who need views the most
summary:
Hey HN, I re-launched an old site I remembered back in the day that someone made called twitchroulette.net with a lot of new features and stats and I would love for people to check it out. The idea is you can easily browse the less browsed parts of twitch and find cool and new streamers to say hi to, and maybe make some new friends.

I also added some real time stats and breakdowns per channel and I think some of the things they show are pretty interesting. Check it out!

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47549160
